title: Synthetic two-room concept to static interactive 3D delivery Page
prompt: Turn a synthetic two-room floor-plan reference into a normalized concept model, a managed isometric still-image plan, and a self-contained manually explorable Three.js Page based on the built-in renovation delivery template; do not add an automatic tour or claim survey or BIM precision.
note: The fixture is synthetic. Customer drawings and generated case media are never committed to product source.
